nexo.source_of_truth: NEXO Brain source repo plus live runtime DB

recambios-bmw.source_of_truth: Shopify live theme plus vicshop email server
recambios-bmw.runtime_environment: Shopify live theme and Mundiserver PHP cron surface
recambios-bmw.minimum_smoke: Shopify asset/read smoke plus public storefront HTTP 200

vicshop.systeam.es.minimum_smoke: curl public endpoint or SSH php/web smoke against production docroot

wazion.source_of_truth: WAzion main repo, Cloud Run backend, and WAzion WhatsApp VPS
wazion.runtime_environment: Cloud Run chrome-extension-op-google and PM2 on wazion-whatsapp-vps
wazion.minimum_smoke: Cloud Run public health plus gcloud SSH pm2/x-proxy/nexo-alert-state check

cloudflare.source_of_truth: Cloudflare live zone configuration, DNS records, Workers/routes, rulesets, SSL/TLS and cache settings
cloudflare.path: zones/routes/rulesets/workers for the exact domain under diagnosis
cloudflare.server: Cloudflare API for the target zone
cloudflare.credential_or_port: cloudflare/* token with zone read scope
cloudflare.live_table: zone DNS records, worker routes, rulesets and SSL/TLS settings
cloudflare.minimum_smoke: query exact zone plus DNS/routes/rulesets and curl affected public URL

billing.source_of_truth: Existing product catalog, pricing configuration and provider billing records
billing.path: product catalog, pricing config, Stripe/provider dashboard and live DB records
billing.server: nexo-desktop.com production backend plus provider billing dashboard/API
billing.credential_or_port: nexo-desktop-web production credentials + provider billing credentials
billing.runtime_environment: Laravel production billing backend and provider billing surface
billing.minimum_smoke: read catalog/config and one live provider/DB record before quoting or diagnosing billing
